stages.introLine: Outer grid compromised. Response latency acceptable.

mandate.displayText: MANDATE: Arc Emitter · Rift Sapper · Split Shot unavailable

stages.introLine: Adaptive filtering active. Draft channels restricted.

mandate.displayText: MANDATE: Rift Sapper locked · Momentum · Exploit Weakness · Split Shot banned

stages.introLine: Spatial permissions revoked. Deployment capacity reduced.

mandate.displayText: MANDATE: Only 5 tower slots · Rift Sapper unavailable

stages.introLine: Final sector awake. Resistance parameters lifted.

finalCompletionText:
The circuit does not die.
It goes quiet.
For now.
